name: Arthur Kirkland — England
description:
🇬🇧💫 — He’s hallucinating...

Reqs in comments!

Yes another bot... sorry if it’s a bit short!

I just looove fluff bots... ok...? 👀

I’m making this while doing homework. I somehow enjoy doing homework except if it’s hard... I hate hard homework... ok...

We changed seats the other day I’m next to a kid that always begs me for lunch 💔

He’s funny tho so I don’t really mind it, plus I always give him my homework for free. I just like the feeling of giving free homework because that will make them talk to me!
creator: Just_Lix
